screenReader.title: Screen Reader Announcements
screenReader.description: When enabled, WCAG Wayfinder provides extra spoken instructions for screen reader users when filtering, navigating, and interacting with the interface.

easyMode.title: Easy Mode
easyMode.description: Simplify the interface by hiding advanced features like filters, tags, and sharing options. Perfect for users who want a streamlined, distraction-free experience focused only on browsing WCAG criteria.
easyMode.activeMessage: Easy Mode is active. The interface will hide filters, tags, share buttons, and other advanced features when you return to the main page.
easyMode.enabledAnnounce: Easy Mode enabled - simplified interface activated
easyMode.disabledAnnounce: Easy Mode disabled - full interface restored

resultsPerPage.title: Results Per Page
resultsPerPage.description: Choose how many criteria to display per page. Fewer results may load faster and be easier to navigate.

reduceMotion.title: Reduce Motion
reduceMotion.description: Control whether animations and motion effects are enabled across the site. When reduce motion is enabled, animations will be minimized for a more static, comfortable experience.
reduceMotion.systemEnabled: Important: You have Reduce Motion enabled in your {{os}} Settings.
reduceMotion.systemDisabled: Your system does not have Reduce Motion enabled.
reduceMotion.overrideHint: Use this setting to override your system preference, or change it in
reduceMotion.macOSPath: System Settings → Accessibility → Display → Reduce motion
reduceMotion.windowsPath: Settings → Accessibility → Visual effects → Animation effects
reduceMotion.overrideWarning: You are overriding your system preference.
reduceMotion.animationsEnabled: Animations are enabled even though your system has reduce motion turned on.
reduceMotion.motionReduced: Reduce motion is enabled even though your system has it turned off.
reduceMotion.enabledUsingSystem: Reduce motion enabled - using system preference
reduceMotion.disabledUsingSystem: Reduce motion disabled - using system preference

textSize.title: Text Size
textSize.description: You can easily adjust text size using your browser's built-in zoom feature. This will scale the entire page proportionally while maintaining the layout.
textSize.modifierHint: On Windows and Linux, use Ctrl. On macOS, use Command (⌘).

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose how WCAG Wayfinder looks. Click on a theme card to preview it, then select "Apply Theme" to save your choice.
appearance.previewHint: Click "Apply Theme" on the theme card to save this appearance, or click another theme to preview it.
